actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Container IDs to limit the ingestion to

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored in this app

parameters.name: want_closed
parameters.description: Also returns closed incidents. Default is true

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: ID of incident to retrieve

parameters.name: incident_name
parameters.description: Name of incident

parameters.name: incident_description
parameters.description: Short description of incident

parameters.name: fullincidentdatadto
parameters.description: Incident data as JSON String, format is FullIncidentDataDTO data type from API

parameters.name: want_full_data
parameters.description: Returns full incident instead of summary. Default is true

parameters.name: want_tasks
parameters.description: Also returns associated tasks. Default is false

actions.name: Update Ticket
actions.description: Update existing incident. This action downloads the incident and copies the provided JSON onto the download data, overwriting any existing data elements

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: ID of incident to update

parameters.name: fullincidentdatadto
parameters.description: Incident data as JSON String, the format is FullIncidentDataDTO data type from API. This data should first be retrieved from Resilient and then modified with the desired changes

parameters.name: handle_format_is_name
parameters.description: Treat handles as a name. Default is true

parameters.name: querydto
parameters.description: Query data as JSON String, the format is QueryDTO data type from API

parameters.name: add_condition_all_active_tickets
parameters.description: Filters for active tickets

parameters.name: add_condition_closed_in_last_24_hours
parameters.description: Filters for tickets closed in last 24 hours

parameters.name: add_condition_created_in_last_24_hours
parameters.description: Filters for tickets created in last 24 hours

parameters.name: 1st_condition_field_name
parameters.description: The field name in the condition

parameters.name: 1st_condition_field_value
parameters.description: The value used for comparison

parameters.name: 1st_condition_value_is_datetime
parameters.description: The value is a datetime; convert to Resilient internal representation

parameters.name: 1st_condition_comparison_method
parameters.description: The method used to compare the value, [equals, gt, lte]. Look up MethodName datatype in the API

parameters.description: The field name in the condition

parameters.name: 2nd_condition_field_value
parameters.description: The value used for comparison

parameters.description: The value is a datetime

parameters.name: 3rd_condition_comparison_method
parameters.description: The method used to compare the value

parameters.description: The value used for comparison

parameters.description: The method used to compare the value
